user.title: Set up GLS
user.description:
Pick the country your parcels are delivered to and the postal code they usually go to. You add parcels after setup.

Only the Netherlands is supported for now — [request another country]({issue_url}).

data_description.postal_code: e.g. 1234AB. Used as the default delivery address for parcels you add.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach GLS. Check your network.
error.invalid_parcel_no: That does not look like a GLS parcel number or tracking ID.
error.invalid_postcode: Enter a valid Dutch postal code, e.g. 1234AB.

abort.already_configured: A GLS hub for this postal code is already set up.

data_description.add: Enter a GLS parcel number or tracking ID to start tracking it. It uses the hub postal code.

data_description.delivered_filter_type: Show delivered parcels from the last X days, or limit to the X most recent.
data_description.delivered_filter_amount: Number of days or parcels to show.

data_description.include_history: Add a per-parcel history attribute listing each status update (timestamp, status, original text). Off by default.

data_description.refresh_interval: How often the integration checks GLS for parcel updates. A slower interval is gentler on GLS's API; the default of 30 minutes is plenty for most parcels.

error.invalid_parcel_no: That does not look like a GLS parcel number or tracking ID.
error.already_tracked: That parcel is already being tracked.

track_parcel.name: Track parcel
track_parcel.description: Start tracking a GLS parcel by its number.

parcel_no.name: Parcel number
parcel_no.description: The GLS parcel number or tracking ID.

postal_code.name: Postal code
postal_code.description: Delivery postal code. Picks the hub when several are set up; otherwise defaults to the only hub.

untrack_parcel.name: Untrack parcel
untrack_parcel.description: Stop tracking a GLS parcel by its number.

parcel_no.name: Parcel number
parcel_no.description: The GLS tracking number to stop tracking.

trigger_type.parcel_delivery_time_changed: A parcel's expected delivery time changed
